description: Code search plugin for project listing and source search with smart ranking and definition-first results

keywords.description: Comma-separated search tokens for search, e.g. ProcessUtils,getPidsByName. Tokens must not contain spaces.

keyword_mode.description: How to join keywords for search: and (default) or or.

search_field.description: Search field for action=search: smart (default), full, path, def, symbol

project.description: Optional project filter. For multiple projects, separate with commas.

type.description: Optional file type filter for search. Supported values: c, cxx, java, kotlin, python, sh, golang, rust.

limit.description: Maximum number of file results to print for action=search. Defaults to config.default_limit (15 if unset).
